items.title: June 2, 1991: NBA on NBC's intro for Game 1 of the NBA Finals between the Bulls and Lakers.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 2, 1991: NBA on NBC's intro for Game 1 of the NBA Finals between the Bulls and Lakers.

Magic Johnson had 19 PTS/11 AST/10 REB, James Worthy scored 22 PTS and Sam Perkins added 22 PTS (3-4 3P) in Los Angeles' 93-91 win. Chicago's Michael Jordan had 36 PTS/12 AST/8 REB/3 STL.
